_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: we then silenced TAZ/YAP in human MPNST cells, SNF02.2 and SNF96.2 by specific siRNA knockdown. We detected a robust reduction in downstream target gene expression and attenuation of proliferation in these MPNST cells
details: TAZ/YAP silencing resulted in robust reduction in downstream target gene expression and attenuation of proliferation in SNF02.2 MPNST cells
